reviews.review_title: Great way to showcase the potential
reviews.review_description:
Excellent game to show the potential of gaming in VR. There is no story whatsoever, and it's pretty easy to beat, but the most annoying part is how repetitve it gets. The same rooms appear dozens of times..
Still highly recommend.

You must have v1.3 installed on your system to download the current game (v1.4). I informed tech support about this. v1.3 needs a clean install so earlier versions will probably not work either. It will download and install twice in 2 100mb chunks. I assume this is by design. Google "downgrade apk gear vr"

Yes, you need a proper game controller for the Go, but it's worth it. Right from the start the graphics are so impressive given the Go's limitations. Sometimes, when not fighting I just looked around and enjoyed the view. You lead your character from room to room using the map for guidance to descend to the next level. Each room may have puzzles to solve, monsters to fight and gems to loot. The fighting's not too difficult (other than the bosses), and if you do die it's a quick respawn and try again. Quit the game any time and continue from where you left off. Final reward (after about 3.5 hours of gameplay) felt a little underplayed, but it does say to be continued. I loved it and look forward to playing more.
about 2 hours of 3d platforming.  Really nice and FREE!!
Stunning graphic.easy control.good action.nice music..everything PERFECT !!! Can't believe its free !!
This game was one of the first games I tested my gamepad with. Its great. The controls feel good and responsive. The graphics are wonderful. I'm going to purchase the other hero bound game as well.
I cant believe this game is free!! This was the first game i played on the vr and the graphics are amazing and the game play is great. I really enjoyed playing this game and hoping for more.

This is the first VR game of this style I have played after trying many others, this 3rd person setup in VR, for me at least, is awesome!!! My favorite right now and it was free!! Some of the others I paid to pay for and didn't like them as much as this one...

Easily the best fully featured fun game on the Go. Great gameplay and excellent controls with an Xbox One S controller.
Highly recommended.

Thought it was good but the only thing that bothered me was that the view did not adjusted to the way I was sitting. I had to sit a certain way to see everything. It was not as comfortable as it could be.

Very slow paced and no difficulty whatsoever. But the game is beautiful and works well. Only thing i might change is better camera angles at times when in a big room. If they did make this into more of a zelda type game w story and depth id totally buy it. Also check out their gladiator game, its awesome
I really enjoy playing this game.

Great graphics and the environments are awesome.  Gameplay is a lot of fun.  The little character cracks me up. Especially when You stop moving him. Get a gamepad if you don’t have one and try this game. It’s a great alternative to the traditional first person view VR game
The game is very nice! Download it without any hesitation. Deserve to be at least 10€
This is basically VR Zelda
Amazing this is free, very fun! :D
Worth all the hard work put into it.

This game is gorgeous and the gameplay is engrossing. It is marred, however, by the lack of support for the gear controller. The gear controller could easily replace the required game pad, and provide a far better experience. Really, I'd rate this a 3.5 if i could, but a 3 seems unfair given how otherwise wonderful this game is.

As I've stated in their other free herobound online title, this is also a bit repetitive but in its own way. It's still a great game with plenty of replay value, also its an offline game. You'll need a controller but it's worth it if you have a compatible controller. I don't really have any complaints except that if you don't complete the game in one session, you'll need to start each dungeon over. I highly recommend this game, good job devs.

This is fun and enjoyable.  It is similar to Zelda.  I cannot play this for long periods though because it is quite jumpy.  Moving your character or moving your view both work fine, but when you move your view and your character at the same time there is a shifting jump in the screen for a brief moment.  It does this everytime so it gets annoying and somewhat hurts the eyes.

It is still fun, but that jumpiness needs to be ironed out.  I am using the Go and Steelseries.
